calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax, Or, In The Alternative, To Strike Costs Claimed By Defendant Mcintosh Associats. D/B/A/ S.R. Travel
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARIO PASTRANA'S Motion To Tax, Or, In The Alternative, To Strike Costs Claimed By Defendant Mcintosh Associates DBA S.R. Travel is taken off calendar as moot. On September 1, 2015, Defendant filed a Notice of Withdrawal of Costs. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel (Res. # 020315-04)
Off Calendar Mar-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTORNEY MICHAEL HOFFMAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARIO PASTRANA is granted. No opposition filed and in view of the recent filing of the action. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
